name: IRC_CX_GJS_CONFIG
description: Stores configuration for SEO Job posting in Hcm Recruiting

columns.Name: CONFIG_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key for this table. System generated.

columns.Name: SITE_SEQUENCE_STR
columns.Comments: Stores the site number sequence in their sequence number order from low to high

columns.Name: SITEMAP
columns.Comments: Stores a snapshot of the jobs sitemap last published to SEO

columns.Name: LAST_SITEMAP_PUBLISH_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the timestamp when the jobs sitemap was last published to SEO

columns.Name: LAST_PING_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the timestamp when there is a ping to SEO

columns.Name: LAST_PING_FAILED_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the timestamp when there is a failed ping to SEO

columns.Name: LAST_ACTIVE_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the date and time the SEO was last activated.

columns.Name: LAST_ACTIVATED_BY
columns.Comments: Indicates the user who last activated the SEO.

columns.Name: LAST_INACTIVE_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the date and time the SEO was last inactivated.

columns.Name: LAST_INACTIVATED_BY
columns.Comments: Indicates the user who last inactivated the SEO.

columns.Name: LAST_CLEANUP_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the date and time the SEO snapshot cleaned up.

columns.Name: LAST_PING_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores HTTP status of the ping response.

columns.Name: LAST_PING_STATUS_MESSAGE
columns.Comments:
Stores the HTTP status response 
note: error msg or success msg

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
